Reviews, the Maloo testing passed, could you please review this patch again? Thanks.
Patch Set 2: Code-Review+2

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

Emoly – Thank you for this patch. I think the patch is good, but I’m concerned that there may be some obsfilter.writethrough_cache_enable references in the test suites. 

Do we need to do anything to conf-sanity test 28a, maybe remove check #1?
From conf-sanity 28a:
1101         # In this test we will set three kinds of proc parameters with
1102         # lctl conf_param:
1103         # 1. the ones moved from the OFD to the OSD, and only their
1104         #    symlinks kept in obdfilter
1105         # 2. non-symlink ones in the OFD
1106         # 3. non-symlink ones in the OSD
1107 
1108         # Check 1.
1109         # prepare a symlink parameter in the OFD
1110         name="writethrough_cache_enable"
1111         param="$device.ost.$name"
1112         cmd="$LCTL get_param -n obdfilter.$device.$name"
…

In test-framework, should we delete get_osd_param() and set_osd_param()?

What do you think?

Patch Set 2:

Looks good to me.

Patch Set 2: Code-Review-1

This change cannot be cherry-picked to master.
Please rebase the change locally and upload the rebased commit for review.

Removed the following votes:

* Code-Review-1 by HPDD Checkpatch (377)

Patch Set 2:

James, thanks for your reminder. I agree to remove #check1 in conf-sanity 28a, but obdfilter.$device.$name still can't be deleted from get/set_osd_param(), because some params other than symlinks, e.g. stats, are still being used.

parents.subject: LU-11075 ldlm: correct logic in ldlm_prepare_lru_list()

commit.subject: LU-11110 ofd: remove obdfilter.*.* symlinks in few releases
commit.message:
LU-11110 ofd: remove obdfilter.*.* symlinks in few releases

Add a #if LUSTRE_VERSION_CODE < OBD_OCD_VERSION(2, 14, 53, 0) check
around the obdfilter.*.* symlinks creation code to keep them in
place for another few releases, so that old test scripts that use
them will not break, then remove them.

Change-Id: I703c7ec3af8434b0de8b7cbed19c2c32611f6b18
Signed-off-by: Emoly Liu <emoly@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-on: https://review.whamcloud.com/32752
Reviewed-by: Andreas Dilger <adilger@whamcloud.com>
Reviewed-by: James Nunez <jnunez@whamcloud.com>
Tested-by: Jenkins
Tested-by: Maloo <hpdd-maloo@intel.com>
Reviewed-by: James Simmons <uja.ornl@yahoo.com>
Reviewed-by: Oleg Drokin <green@whamcloud.com>
